extra.message: SQL injection via unsanitized 'filter' GraphQL argument. User input from filter parameter is directly interpolated into raw SQL using Python string formatting: result.filter(text("title = '%s' or content = '%s'" % (filter, filter))). An attacker can inject arbitrary SQL by manipulating the filter parameter of the pastes query.

OS command injection in ImportPaste mutation. User-controlled host, port, path, and scheme parameters are used to construct a URL passed to os.popen via helpers.run_cmd(f'curl --insecure {url}'). The strip_dangerous_characters() function is bypassed in easy mode (returns cmd unchanged) and in hard mode only removes ';' and '&', leaving backticks, $(), pipes, and newlines exploitable.

cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command

extra.message: OS command injection via the 'cmd' GraphQL argument in systemDiagnostics query. User-supplied cmd parameter is passed directly to os.popen via helpers.run_cmd(cmd). In easy mode, security.allowed_cmds() always returns True, so arbitrary commands can be executed. Requires valid admin credentials, making this an authenticated remote code execution vulnerability.

cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command

extra.message: OS command injection via the 'arg' GraphQL argument in systemDebug query. User-supplied arg parameter is concatenated directly into a command string: helpers.run_cmd('ps {}'.format(arg)), which is executed via os.popen. No authentication or input validation is performed. An attacker can inject arbitrary commands (e.g., arg='aux; id').

cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command

extra.message: Path traversal vulnerability in file upload via the UploadPaste mutation. The user-supplied filename parameter is concatenated directly to WEB_UPLOADDIR ('pastes/') without any sanitization: f = open(WEB_UPLOADDIR + filename, 'w'). An attacker can use directory traversal sequences (e.g., filename='../../../etc/cron.d/evil') to write arbitrary files anywhere on the filesystem.

cwe: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory
